comment: Known protocol-internal addresses and institutional wallets that should be excluded from the real-user leaderboard. Used as a manual override when on-chain heuristic (uninit OR owner!=System) misses them — typically because the address is a system-owned ed25519 pubkey derived by a program, OR a regular EOA fronting a Squads multisig + Clique L2T compliance wrapper (institutional).

CWGGhiezrFdQg7b8gBERUJz6w9MceyShnV2ZY4Yn.label: Institutional vault (Squads multisig + Clique L2T compliance, $7.68M USX/eUSX-Jun26 LP)
